narrative: Tier-2 supplier providing IT services to DoD prime. CMMC Level 2 certified by C3PAO, assessment 18 months ago. NIST SP 800-171 SPRS score 110 (perfect), posted 14 months ago. DFARS 252.204-7012 cyber clause flowed down to all subs. Section 889 representation in SAM.gov: does not use covered telecom. Counterfeit-parts program per SAE AS5553 implemented; authorized-distributor-only policy; GIDEP reporting subscribed. SAM.gov exclusion check: no hits. CUI properly marked + portion-marked. ITAR scope: none for this contract.
